# Data Analysis Report Template

```markdown
# Data Analysis Report: [Title]

**Date:** [Analysis Date]
**Dataset:** [Description, date range, sample size]

## Executive Summary

[2–3 sentences: key findings and top recommendation.]

## Objectives

- [Research question 1]
- [Research question 2]

## Data Overview

| Attribute     | Value                  |
| ------------- | ---------------------- |
| Source        | [Where data came from] |
| Time Period   | [Date range]           |
| Sample Size   | [N observations]       |
| Key Variables | [List main variables]  |

## Data Quality Assessment

- **Completeness:** X% complete (Y missing values across Z columns)
- **Issues Identified:** [List data quality problems with severity: high/medium/low]
- **Cleaning Steps:** [What was done to prepare data]

## Findings

### Finding 1: [Insight Title]

**Observation:** [What the data shows — specific numbers]
**Evidence:** [Statistics, test results, visualization reference]
**Significance:** [Statistical test result if applicable, e.g., t(87) = 3.2, p = 0.002, d = 0.68]
**Implication:** [What this means — so what?]

### Finding 2: [Insight Title]

[Repeat structure]

## Methodology

- **Statistical Tests Used:** [List tests and rationale for each]
- **Key Assumptions:** [Assumptions made and whether they were verified]
- **Limitations:** [What this analysis cannot tell us]

## Recommendations

1. **[Action]** — Expected Impact: [quantified if possible] — Owner: [role]
2. **[Action]** — Expected Impact: [quantified if possible] — Owner: [role]

## Next Steps

- [ ] Further analysis needed: [specify]
- [ ] Additional data to collect: [specify]
- [ ] Follow-up questions: [list]

## Appendix

[Detailed tables, methodology notes, raw statistical output]
```
